description: Real Codex thread acceptance pack for Plugin-owned cold-start -> architecture Recipe -> dimension complete -> architecture rescan.

submitKnowledgeItem.title: Architecture Boundary Uses A Single Entry Point

content.pattern: Route project-wide initialization through one host-owned entry point.
content.rationale: The architecture dimension should capture module boundaries and ownership instead of implementation trivia.

submitKnowledgeItem.doClause: Use the Plugin-owned Codex MCP entry point for host-agent cold-start orchestration.
submitKnowledgeItem.dontClause: Do not introduce an Alembic internal Agent runtime or external AI provider for this acceptance loop.
submitKnowledgeItem.whenClause: When Codex starts a fresh Alembic knowledge loop for a project.
submitKnowledgeItem.description: Architecture Recipe proving the Plugin-owned cold-start Recipe loop.
submitKnowledgeItem.usageGuide: Use this only as an acceptance Recipe for the architecture dimension.

reasoning.whyStandard: It verifies that Plugin-owned Codex tools can persist architecture knowledge and preserve it through rescan.
